match_pattern: AUTO_TRADE/AUTO_SELL must be DISABLED; OFFICIAL_DECISION_IMPACT must be NONE
description: Any trading, sell automation, or official decision impact marker outside the read-only contract is a true blocking safety failure.
Explicit module failure is treated as blocking unless a future manual mode defines a narrower exception.
Forward evidence can be unavailable because future price horizons have not matured; this is expected and not fatal.
Template or incomplete account-state warnings are operator warnings, not trading failures in this read-only flow.

match_pattern: yfinance, historical provider, price cache, preflight warning/failure
description: Provider or price-cache issues are warnings unless they prevented output generation or produced an explicit fail.

match_pattern: Current report missing today generated date and older file timestamp
description: Current operator-facing reports that appear old should be reviewed, but this does not change ranking or weights.

match_pattern: MISSING_FACTOR, MISSING_INPUT_EXPERIMENT, READY count zero, research pending
description: Research and experiment evidence may be registered but not yet mature enough for forward attribution.

match_pattern: STATUS begins with WARN_ and no more specific rule matched
description: WARN statuses are not automatically fatal; classify by reason and surface unresolved warnings for review.

match_pattern: Optional historical READ_FIRST file does not exist
description: Missing older or optional module outputs are recorded and do not fail the command center.

match_pattern: Critical current read-center output does not exist
description: Missing critical current operator outputs are blocking because the command center cannot be judged reliably.

match_pattern: STATUS begins with OK_ or equals OK and no safety issue
description: OK statuses with intact read-only safety markers are ready from the operator status perspective.

match_pattern: No recognized status or parseable signal
description: Unrecognized sources are surfaced for human review without assuming a fabricated status.
